spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/system_info?useSSL=false&serverTimezone=UTC&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
spring.datasource.username=system_user
spring.datasource.password=secure_password_placeholder
spring.datasource.driver-class-name=com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver

# JPA/Hibernate configuration (optional but recommended for Spring Data JPA)
spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=none
spring.jpa.show-sql=false
spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect
